scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts DemoVideo out/demo.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:webm: remotion render src/index.ts DemoVideo out/demo.webm --codec vp8
scripts.render:workbench: remotion render src/index.ts WorkbenchDemo out/workbench-demo.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:workbench:webm: remotion render src/index.ts WorkbenchDemo out/workbench-demo.webm --codec vp8
scripts.render:demo-streaming: remotion render src/index.ts DemoStreaming out/streaming.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:demo-agent-creation: remotion render src/index.ts DemoAgentCreation out/agent-creation.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:demo-multi-agent: remotion render src/index.ts DemoMultiAgent out/multi-agent.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:demo-rag-memory: remotion render src/index.ts DemoRagMemory out/rag-memory.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:demo-planning: remotion render src/index.ts DemoPlanningEngine out/planning-engine.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:all-demos: npm run render:demo-streaming && npm run render:demo-agent-creation && npm run render:demo-multi-agent && npm run render:demo-rag-memory && npm run render:demo-planning
